# Hr Timesheet Analytic Tag

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

The module restores the possibility of defining analytical tags in
project tasks and timesheets so that the analytical items generated have
those tags.

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-analytic/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/account-analytic/issues/new?body=module:%20hr_timesheet_analytic_tag%0Aversion:%2018.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).
